message:
test(rangeset): expand from 45 to 69 tests for range set operations (wa-f6937)

Add 24 new tests: Debug formatting, u32/usize type support,
remove_range edge cases (entire, superset, left/right edge, empty),
intersection_with_range (no overlap, partial, containment), complex
add_set/remove_set with multiple ranges, adjacent range merging,
reverse-order insertion, overlapping-all-existing merge, iter counts,
self-difference, difference-with-empty, unchecked-add contains, and
single-value add/remove/duplicate operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
